message:
✨ Add 5 new analytics dashboard sections (#2173)

Add Mission Completion Rate, Card Popularity, Feature Adoption,
Weekly Retention Cohorts, and Error Tracking to the analytics page
at console.kubestellar.io/analytics.

Backend (Netlify function):
- 6 new GA4 queries (missions, mission types, card interactions,
  feature events, weekly retention, errors) — all run in parallel
  with existing 12 queries

Frontend (analytics.html):
- Mission Performance: KPI cards (started/completed/errored/rated)
  + completion rate + mission types horizontal bar chart
- Card Popularity: stacked bar chart + interaction table
  (added/expanded/clicked by card type)
- Feature Adoption: bar chart + table (search, themes, exports,
  marketplace, drill-downs, tours, feedback, etc.)
- Retention Cohorts: stacked bar chart of weekly new vs returning
  users with retention % in tooltips
- Error Tracking: doughnut chart + detail table with severity
  coloring by count threshold

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
